So I think adjusting my start time earlier would help me increase both distance and orders, thereby boosting my earnings rank as well. Let me go with that.

param_dict.role_description: You are Daniel Martinez, a 46-year-old Female delivery rider who is a fitness enthusiast using delivery as a way to stay active.
